message:
perf(test): speed up internal/witness tests from 22s to ~8s (gt-l7x9)

Parallelize witness tests and make shared global state thread-safe:
- Add t.Parallel() to ~70 tests across 5 test files
- Introduce bdCommand var to replace t.Setenv("PATH") which is
  incompatible with t.Parallel()
- Add sync.RWMutex to tmux.defaultSocket and session.defaultRegistry
- Add sync.Mutex to witness.initRegistryFromTownRoot

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
